data.headline: Find Your Perfect NYC Home
data.body: I'm Alex Rivera — a licensed NYC real estate professional specializing in Manhattan condos, Brooklyn brownstones, and Queens co-ops. With deep neighborhood knowledge and a data-first approach, I help clients make confident decisions in the city's fastest-moving market.

data.title: What I Offer
data.subtitle: Full-service real estate for the NYC market.

items.title: Market Analysis
items.description: Data-driven pricing using recent comparable sales, market trends, and neighborhood-level analytics.

items.title: Expert Negotiation
items.description: Experienced deal-making in competitive bidding situations — I've won offers in 10+ bid wars this year alone.

items.title: Full-Service Closing
items.description: Coordinated from accepted offer through keys in hand — attorneys, inspections, and board packages handled.

items.title: Buyer Representation
items.description: Exclusive buyer agency with access to off-market listings and new developments before public launch.

items.title: Investment Advisory
items.description: ROI analysis, rental yield projections, and portfolio strategy for real estate investors.

data.title: How It Works
data.subtitle: Three steps to your next move.

steps.title: Tell Me What You Need
steps.description: Fill out the form with your details — buying, selling, or just exploring.

steps.title: Get Your Report
steps.description: Receive a personalized market analysis with comparable sales, pricing trends, and my professional recommendation.

steps.title: Let's Meet
steps.description: Schedule a walkthrough, virtual tour, or strategy session — whatever works for you.

data.title: Recent Sales

data.title: Client Reviews
data.subtitle: What past clients say about working with me.

items.text: Alex found us the perfect condo in record time. Incredibly responsive and knows every neighborhood inside out. We never felt rushed or pressured.
Best experience buying in NYC. Alex's data-driven approach gave us confidence in a crazy market. Closed $30K under asking.
We were relocating from Chicago and Alex made the entire process seamless. Virtual tours, neighborhood guides, school info — he covered everything.

data.title: What's Your Property Worth?
data.subtitle: Get a free NYC market analysis in minutes.
data.description: Enter your address below and I'll send you a detailed market analysis with comparable sales, price trends, and my professional valuation. **100% free, no strings.**

data.title: About Alex
bio: I'm Alex Rivera — a licensed real estate salesperson with Metro Realty Group, specializing in NYC residential real estate. From Manhattan condos to Brooklyn brownstones, I've closed over 150 transactions totaling $45M+ in sales volume.

My approach is data-first: I use market analytics, neighborhood trends, and pricing models to help clients make smart decisions. Whether you're a first-time buyer, seasoned investor, or ready to sell, I bring the same level of research and dedication to every deal.
Born in Queens, raised in the Bronx, and living in Brooklyn — I know this city inside and out.

thank_you.heading: Thank You!
thank_you.subheading: Your Market Analysis Is Being Prepared
thank_you.body: {firstName} will send your personalized NYC market report to your email shortly.
thank_you.disclaimer: This report is a Comparative Market Analysis (CMA) and is not an appraisal.
